title: Natural raises $30M to reinvent payments for AI agents — and take on Stripe | TechCrunch
summary: About a year ago, Natural co-founder and CEO Kahlil Lalji realized that AI agents were evolving faster than existing financial architecture, which can’t support tasks like autonomously paying a vendor, collecting payments, or transacting with each other.
